2605.23569.title: CP or DP? Why Not Both: A Case Study in the Partial Shop Scheduling Problem
2605.23569.paper_summary: Dynamic Programming (DP) and Constraint Programming (CP) are well-established paradigms for solving combinatorial optimization problems. Usually, these two approaches are used separately. This paper aims to show that the two can be combined effectively and elegantly, with DP serving as the primary search framework and CP used as a subroutine to leverage global constraint propagation. This paper presents such an approach for the Partial Shop Scheduling Problem (PSSP), for which a pure DP method has previously been proposed, and efficient CP filtering algorithms are available. The PSSP is a general scheduling problem where each job consists of a set of operations with arbitrary precedence constraints. The approach is flexible enough to accommodate anytime DP strategies, such as anytime column search, whereas the original DP algorithm operated in a strictly layer-wise manner. Moreover, the flexibility of the CP modeling makes it straightforward to incorporate arbitrary precedence constraints. As a result, the model naturally handles any precedence graph and even enables the design of a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) scheme, in which the DP model is reused, and partial-order schedules are imposed across restarts to improve the incumbent solution. While not competitive with state-of-the-art pure CP solvers for this specific problem, our primary contribution is demonstrating the viability of this hybrid integration.
2605.23569.paper_summary_zh: 動態規劃（DP）和約束規劃（CP）是解決組合優化問題的成熟範式。<lb/> 通常，這兩種方法是分開使用的。<lb/> 本文旨在展示這兩者可以有效且優雅地結合，DP 作為主要的搜索框架，而 CP 作為子程序用於利用全局約束傳播。<lb/> 本文提出了一種針對部分商店排程問題（PSSP）的這種方法，之前已經提出了一種純 DP 方法，並且有高效的 CP 篩選算法可用。<lb/> PSSP 是一個一般的排程問題，其中每個工作由一組具有任意優先順序約束的操作組成。<lb/> 該方法足夠靈活，可以適應隨時 DP 策略，例如隨時列搜索，而原始的 DP 算法則是以嚴格的層級方式運作。<lb/> 此外，CP 建模的靈活性使得納入任意優先順序約束變得簡單明瞭。<lb/> 因此，該模型自然處理任何優先順序圖，甚至使得設計大型鄰域搜索（LNS）方案成為可能，其中重用 DP 模型，並在重啟過程中施加部分順序排程以改善現有解。<lb/> 雖然在這個特定問題上不具備與最先進的純 CP 求解器競爭的能力，但我們的主要貢獻是展示這種混合整合的可行性。
2605.23569.author: Emma Legrand et.al.
2605.23569.authors: Emma Legrand, Roger Kameugne, Pierre Schaus
